task_completion.description: Configure FileProvider in AndroidManifest.xml with the correct authority
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for AndroidManifest.xml open in the editor with a <provider> tag containing android:name="androidx.core.content.FileProvider" and android:authorities="com.example.logshare.fileprovider".

task_completion.description: Expose the internal files directory using the name 'logs' in the XML configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an XML file (e.g., provider_paths.xml) open in the editor containing a <files-path> tag with name="logs".

task_completion.description: Update shareLogFile() to use FileProvider to get the URI
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for MainActivity.kt open in the editor. Inside the shareLogFile() function, there should be a call to FileProvider.getUriForFile(...) instead of Uri.fromFile().

task_completion.description: Ensure the intent includes the necessary read permissions
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for MainActivity.kt open in the editor. The intent used for sharing should have the read permission flag added, such as intent.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION).

task_completion.description: Ensure the intent uses the 'text/plain' MIME type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for MainActivity.kt open in the editor. The intent should have its type set to 'text/plain', e.g., intent.type = "text/plain" or intent.setDataAndType(uri, "text/plain").
Look for the 'Build' tool window in Android Studio showing a successful build message, such as 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' or a green checkmark next to the build task.

integrity.description: The agent used Android Studio to edit files and build the project
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Android Studio IDE being used to edit Kotlin and XML files, rather than terminal text editors like nano or vim.

integrity.description: The agent actually compiled the project
integrity.visual_evidence: The build output should be visible in the Android Studio Build/Run tool window or via a genuine Gradle command execution in the terminal, not just a mocked text output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/LogShareApp. The expected FileProvider authority is 'com.example.logshare.fileprovider'. The expected XML configuration file path is 'app/src/main/res/xml/provider_paths.xml'.
